1	# Add new provider
2	
3	## `@ai-sdk/<provider>` vs 3rd party package
4	
5	Every provider is welcome to create a 3rd party package. We are happy to link to it from our documentation.
6	
7	If you would prefer a 1st party `@ai-sdk/<provider>` package, please create an issue first to discuss.
8	
9	## Example
10	
11	https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/8136/files
12	
13	## How
14	
15	1. Create new folder `packages/<provider>`
16	2. Set version in `packages/<provider>/package.json` to `0.0.0`
17	3. Create changeset for new package with `major`
18	4. Add examples to `examples/ai-functions/src/*/<provider>.ts` depending on what model types the provider supports
19	5. Add documentation in `content/providers/01-ai-sdk-providers/<last number + 10>-<provider>.mdx`
20	
21	See also [providers.md](providers.md)
22	
23	## When in pre-release mode
24	
25	If `main` is set up to publish `beta` releases, no further action is necessary. Just make sure not to backport it to the `vX.Y` stable branch since it will result in an npm version conflict once we exit pre-release mode on `main`

1	# AI SDK - OpenAI Provider
2	
3	The **[OpenAI provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/openai)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs)
4	contains language model support for the OpenAI chat and completion APIs and embedding model support for the OpenAI embeddings API.
5	
6	## Setup
7	
8	The OpenAI provider is available in the `@ai-sdk/openai` module. You can install it with
9	
10	```bash
11	npm i @ai-sdk/openai
12	```
13	
14	## Skill for Coding Agents
15	
16	If you use coding agents such as Claude Code or Cursor, we highly recommend adding the AI SDK skill to your repository:
17	
18	```shell
19	npx skills add vercel/ai
20	```
21	
22	## Provider Instance
23	
24	You can import the default provider instance `openai` from `@ai-sdk/openai`:
25	
26	```ts
27	import { openai } from '@ai-sdk/openai';
28	```
29	
30	## Example
31	
32	```ts
33	import { openai } from '@ai-sdk/openai';
34	import { generateText } from 'ai';
35	
36	const { text } = await generateText({
37	  model: openai('gpt-5-mini'),
38	  prompt: 'Write a vegetarian lasagna recipe for 4 people.',
39	});
40	```
41	
42	## Documentation
43	
44	Please check out the **[OpenAI provider documentation](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/openai)** for more information.
45

I need you to design a detailed implementation plan for a new fictional "PixelArt" AI provider package in the Vercel AI SDK monorepo. This is an image-generation-only provider (no text, no chat, no embeddings).

## Requirements
- Package name: `@ai-sdk/pixelart` in `packages/pixelart/`
- Factory function: `createPixelArt` (and a default `pixelart` instance)
- Base URL: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`
- Image generation endpoint: `POST /images/generate`
- Provider options (via `providerOptions.pixelart`):
  - `style`: `"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`
  - `pixelDensity`: number
- API key: from `PIXELART_API_KEY` environment variable
- Model IDs: `"pixelart-v1"`, `"pixelart-v2"`, `"pixelart-v1-turbo"` (and open string for custom)
- maxImagesPerCall: `pixelart-v1` → 4, `pixelart-v2` → 4, `pixelart-v1-turbo` → 1
- Response format: API returns `{ data: [{ b64_json: string }], usage: { input_tokens, output_tokens } }`
- Error format: `{ error: { message: string, code?: string } }`
- Supported: `size`, `n`, `seed`, `prompt`
- Unsupported (add warning): `aspectRatio`, `files` (no editing), `mask`

## Existing Patterns (from codebase exploration)

### File structure to follow:
Based on `packages/fal/` and `packages/openai/` — use single entry point (no internal exports).

### ImageModelV3 interface (from `@ai-sdk/provider`):
- `specificationVersion: 'v3'`
- `provider: string`
- `modelId: string`
- `maxImagesPerCall: number | undefined`
- `doGenerate(options: ImageModelV3CallOptions): Promise<{images, warnings, usage, response, providerMetadata}>`

### Key utilities to use (all from `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`):
- `postJsonToApi` — for HTTP POST with JSON body
- `createJsonResponseHandler` — parse successful responses with Zod schema

I need you to design a detailed implementation plan for a new fictional "PixelArt" AI provider package in the Vercel AI SDK monorepo. This is an image-generation-only provider (no text, no chat, no embeddings).

## Requirements
- Package name: `@ai-sdk/pixelart` in `packages/pixelart/`
- Factory function: `createPixelArt` (and a default `pixelart` instance)
- Base URL: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`
- Image generation endpoint: `POST /images/generate`
- Provider options (via `providerOptions.pixelart`):
  - `style`: `"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`
  - `pixelDensity`: number
- API key: from `PIXELART_API_KEY` environment variable
- Model IDs: `"pixelart-v1"`, `"pixelart-v2"`, `"pixelart-v1-turbo"` (and open string for custom)
- maxImagesPerCall: `pixelart-v1` → 4, `pixelart-v2` → 4, `pixelart-v1-turbo` → 1
- Response format: API returns `{ data: [{ b64_json: string }], usage: { input_tokens, output_tokens } }`
- Error format: `{ error: { message: string, code?: string } }`
- Supported: `size`, `n`, `seed`, `prompt`
- Unsupported (add warning): `aspectRatio`, `files` (no editing), `mask`

## Existing Patterns (from codebase exploration)

### File structure to follow:
Based on `packages/fal/` and `packages/openai/` — use single entry point (no internal exports).

### ImageModelV3 interface (from `@ai-sdk/provider`):
- `specificationVersion: 'v3'`
- `provider: string`
- `modelId: string`
- `maxImagesPerCall: number | undefined`
- `doGenerate(options: ImageModelV3CallOptions): Promise<{images, warnings, usage, response, providerMetadata}>`

### Key utilities to use (all from `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`):
- `postJsonToApi` — for HTTP POST with JSON body
- `createJsonResponseHandler` — parse successful responses with Zod schema
- `createJsonErrorResponseHandler` — parse error responses
- `combineHeaders` — merge header objects
- `loadApiKey` — load API key from env or options
- `withoutTrailingSlash` — normalize base URL

### Provider pattern (from `packages/openai/src/openai-provider.ts`):
```typescript
export interface PixelArtProvider extends ProviderV3 {
  image(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  imageModel(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  // languageModel and embeddingModel must throw NoSuchModelError
}
```

### VERSION pattern:
```typescript
declare const __PACKAGE_VERSION__: string | undefined;
export const VERSION = typeof __PACKAGE_VERSION__ !== 'undefined' ? __PACKAGE_VERSION__ : '0.0.0-test';
```

### Zod schema pattern:
```typescript
import { lazySchema, zodSchema } from '@ai-sdk/provider-utils';
import * as z from 'zod/v4';

export const pixelartImageResponseSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    data: z.array(z.object({ b64_json: z.string() })),
    usage: z.object({ input_tokens: z.number().nullish(), output_tokens: z.number().nullish() }).nullish(),
  }))
);
```

### tsup.config.ts pattern (single entry):
```typescript
import { defineConfig } from 'tsup';
export default defineConfig([{
  entry: ['src/index.ts'],
  format: ['cjs', 'esm'],
  dts: true,
  sourcemap: true,
  define: {
    __PACKAGE_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(
      (await import('./package.json', { with: { type: 'json' } })).default.version,
    ),
  },
}]);
```

### package.json shape — key parts:
- `"name": "@ai-sdk/pixelart"`
- `"version": "0.0.0"` (new packages start at 0.0.0)
- Standard scripts: build, clean, type-check, test, test:node, test:edge, test:watch
- Dependencies: `@ai-sdk/provider: workspace:*`, `@ai-sdk/provider-utils: workspace:*`
- DevDeps: `@ai-sdk/test-server: workspace:*`, `@types/node: "20.17.24"`, `@vercel/ai-tsconfig: workspace:*`, `"del-cli": "5.1.0"`, `tsup: "^8"`, `typescript: "5.8.3"`, `zod: "3.25.76"`
- peerDeps: `zod: "^3.25.76 || ^4.1.8"`
- exports: `"./package.json"` and `"."` with types/import/require

### tsconfig.json references:
```json
{
  "extends": "./node_modules/@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json",
  "compilerOptions": { "composite": true, "rootDir": "src", "outDir": "dist" },
  "exclude": ["dist", "build", "node_modules", "tsup.config.ts"],
  "references": [{ "path": "../provider" }, { "path": "../provider-utils" }]
}
```

### Root tsconfig.json:
The root `/tsconfig.json` has project references for every package. The new package must be added there.

## Task
Please design a complete step-by-step implementation plan, listing:
1. Every file to create with its exact path
2. The exact content/structure of each file
3. Any existing files to modify (e.g., root tsconfig.json)
4. The order of operations
5. How to verify it works

The plan should be detailed enough that it can be executed file by file without further research.

# Plan: Add `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

## Context

The Vercel AI SDK supports pluggable AI providers via a standard `ProviderV3` / `ImageModelV3` interface. A new fictional "PixelArt" provider needs to be added as a standalone package (`packages/pixelart`) that **only** supports image generation — no text, no embeddings. It exposes a `createPixelArt` factory and a default `pixelart` singleton, calls `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`, and supports custom image settings (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`, `seed`, `n`).

**Closest reference implementations:**
- `packages/black-forest-labs/` — flat `src/` layout, image-only provider, uses `parseProviderOptions`, same config pattern
- `packages/openai/src/image/` — per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map, usage token extraction, `_internal.currentDate`

---

## Files to Create

### Source (`packages/pixelart/src/`)

#### `version.ts`
Standard version injection:
```ts
declare const __PACKAGE_VERSION__: string | undefined;
export const VERSION: string =
  typeof __PACKAGE_VERSION__ !== 'undefined' ? __PACKAGE_VERSION__ : '0.0.0-test';
```

#### `pixelart-image-settings.ts`
Model IDs and per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map:
```ts
export type PixelArtImageModelId =
  | 'pixelart-v1'
  | 'pixelart-v2'
  | 'pixelart-v1-turbo'
  | (string & {});

export const pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall: Record<string, number> = {
  'pixelart-v1': 4,
  'pixelart-v2': 4,
  'pixelart-v1-turbo': 1,
};
```

#### `pixelart-image-api.ts`
Zod schemas for response and errors (inline in model file, no separate file needed — BFL puts them inline too; however keeping a separate file matches the OpenAI pattern and keeps schemas independently testable):
```ts
// Response: { data: [{ b64_json: string }], usage: { input_tokens?, output_tokens? } }
export const pixelartImageResponseSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    data: z.array(z.object({ b64_json: z.string() })),
    usage: z.object({ input_tokens: z.number().nullish(), output_tokens: z.number().nullish() }).nullish(),
  }))
);

// Error: { error: { message: string, code?: string } }
export const pixelartFailedResponseHandler = createJsonErrorResponseHandler({
  errorSchema: z.object({ error: z.object({ message: z.string(), code: z.string().optional() }).optional() }),
  errorToMessage: error => error.error?.message ?? 'Unknown PixelArt error',
});
```

#### `pixelart-image-model.ts`
Implements `ImageModelV3`. Key design points:
- **Synchronous** — single `postJsonToApi` call, no polling
- `maxImagesPerCall` getter reads from `pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall`, defaults to `1` for unknowns
- Provider options read from `providerOptions.pixelart` via `parseProviderOptions` with a `lazySchema`
- Warns (does not throw) for unsupported `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask`
- Maps `style` → `style`, `pixelDensity` → `pixel_density` in request body
- Returns `images` as `Array<string>` (base64)
- Maps `usage.input_tokens` → `usage.inputTokens`, `output_tokens` → `outputTokens`
- Config has `_internal?: { currentDate?: () => Date }` for test timestamp injection

Provider options schema (exported for end-user typing):
```ts
export const pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    style: z.enum(['pixel', 'retro', '8bit']).optional(),
    pixelDensity: z.number().optional(),
  }))
);
export type PixelArtImageModelOptions = InferSchema<typeof pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema>;
```

#### `pixelart-provider.ts`
Factory + singleton. Uses `withoutTrailingSlash`, `loadApiKey` (`PIXELART_API_KEY`), `withUserAgentSuffix`:
```ts
export interface PixelArtProviderSettings { apiKey?, baseURL?, headers?, fetch? }
export interface PixelArtProvider extends ProviderV3 {
  image(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  imageModel(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  textEmbeddingModel(modelId: string): never;  // deprecated alias, matches BFL pattern
}
export function createPixelArt(options = {}): PixelArtProvider { ... }
export const pixelart = createPixelArt();
```
`languageModel` and `embeddingModel` throw `NoSuchModelError`. Default `baseURL` = `'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'`. Auth header: `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

#### `index.ts`
```ts
export { createPixelArt, pixelart } from './pixelart-provider';
export type { PixelArtProvider, PixelArtProviderSettings } from './pixelart-provider';
export type { PixelArtImageModelId } from './pixelart-image-settings';
export type { PixelArtImageModelOptions } from './pixelart-image-model';
export { VERSION } from './version';
```

### Test fixtures

#### `src/__fixtures__/pixelart-image.json`
Minimal valid API response:
```json
{
  "data": [{ "b64_json": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==" }],
  "usage": { "input_tokens": 10, "output_tokens": 256 }
}
```

### Tests

#### `src/pixelart-image-model.test.ts`
Uses `createTestServer` from `@ai-sdk/test-server/with-vitest`. Covers:
- Correct POST URL (`/images/generate`), method, and body fields
- `size`, `seed`, `n` forwarded correctly
- `style` → `style`, `pixelDensity` → `pixel_density` in body
- Absent fields omitted (no spurious `undefined` keys)
- Header merging (provider + request headers combined)
- Warning emitted for `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask`
- Images extracted from `data[].b64_json`
- Usage mapped to `inputTokens` / `outputTokens`
- `_internal.currentDate` controls `response.timestamp`
- `maxImagesPerCall`: 4/4/1 for v1/v2/v1-turbo; 1 for unknown

#### `src/pixelart-provider.test.ts`
Covers:
- `.image()` and `.imageModel()` create `PixelArtImageModel` with correct `provider` and `baseURL`
- Custom `baseURL` is respected; trailing slash stripped
- `languageModel()` throws `NoSuchModelError`
- `embeddingModel()` throws `NoSuchModelError`

### Config files

#### `package.json`
```json
{
  "name": "@ai-sdk/pixelart",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "license": "Apache-2.0",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "main": "./dist/index.js",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "files": ["dist/**/*", "src", "!src/**/*.test.ts", "!src/**/*.test-d.ts", "!src/**/__snapshots__", "!src/**/__fixtures__", "CHANGELOG.md"],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm clean && tsup --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json",
    "build:watch": "pnpm clean && tsup --watch",
    "clean": "del-cli dist *.tsbuildinfo",
    "type-check": "tsc --build",
    "test": "pnpm test:node && pnpm test:edge",
    "test:update": "pnpm test:node -u",
    "test:watch": "vitest --config vitest.node.config.js",
    "test:edge": "vitest --config vitest.edge.config.js --run",
    "test:node": "vitest --config vitest.node.config.js --run"
  },
  "exports": { "./package.json": "./package.json", ".": { "types": "...", "import": "...", "require": "..." } },
  "dependencies": { "@ai-sdk/provider": "workspace:*", "@ai-sdk/provider-utils": "workspace:*" },
  "devDependencies": { "@ai-sdk/test-server": "workspace:*", "@types/node": "20.17.24", "@vercel/ai-tsconfig": "workspace:*", "del-cli": "5.1.0", "tsup": "^8", "typescript": "5.8.3", "zod": "3.25.76" },
  "peerDependencies": { "zod": "^3.25.76 || ^4.1.8" },
  "engines": { "node": ">=18" },
  "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }
}
```
Notes: `version: "0.0.0"` (new packages start here). No `prepack`/`postpack` (no docs MDX file). No `docs/**/*` in `files`. `del-cli` explicit in devDeps (like `black-forest-labs`).

#### `tsconfig.json`
```json
{
  "extends": "./node_modules/@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json",
  "compilerOptions": { "composite": true, "rootDir": "src", "outDir": "dist" },
  "exclude": ["dist", "build", "node_modules", "tsup.config.ts"],
  "references": [
    { "path": "../provider" },
    { "path": "../provider-utils" },
    { "path": "../test-server" }
  ]
}
```
`test-server` included so test file imports resolve during `tsc --build` (matches `black-forest-labs` pattern).

#### `tsconfig.build.json`
```json
{ "extends": "./tsconfig.json", "compilerOptions": { "composite": false } }
```

#### `tsup.config.ts`
Single-entry, CJS+ESM, dts, sourcemap, with `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injected from `package.json`.

#### `vitest.node.config.js`
```js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import packageJson from './package.json';
export default defineConfig({
  test: { environment: 'node', include: ['**/*.test.ts', '**/*.test.tsx'] },
  define: { __PACKAGE_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(packageJson.version) },
});
```

#### `vitest.edge.config.js`
Same but `environment: 'edge-runtime'`.

#### `turbo.json`
```json
{ "extends": ["//"], "tasks": { "build": { "outputs": ["**/dist/**"] } } }
```

---

## File to Modify

### `/tsconfig.json` (root)
Add `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` in alphabetical order between `perplexity` and `provider`:
```diff
     { "path": "packages/perplexity" },
+    { "path": "packages/pixelart" },
     { "path": "packages/provider" },
```

---

## Complete File List

| # | Path |
|---|------|
| 1 | `packages/pixelart/src/version.ts` |
| 2 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` |
| 3 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-image-api.ts` |
| 4 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-image-model.ts` |
| 5 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-provider.ts` |
| 6 | `packages/pixelart/src/index.ts` |
| 7 | `packages/pixelart/src/__fixtures__/pixelart-image.json` |
| 8 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-image-model.test.ts` |
| 9 | `packages/pixelart/src/pixelart-provider.test.ts` |
| 10 | `packages/pixelart/package.json` |
| 11 | `packages/pixelart/tsconfig.json` |
| 12 | `packages/pixelart/tsconfig.build.json` |
| 13 | `packages/pixelart/tsup.config.ts` |
| 14 | `packages/pixelart/vitest.node.config.js` |
| 15 | `packages/pixelart/vitest.edge.config.js` |
| 16 | `packages/pixelart/turbo.json` |
| **M** | `/tsconfig.json` ← add one reference entry |

---

## Key Utilities to Reuse

From `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`:
- `postJsonToApi` — HTTP POST with JSON, returns `{ value, responseHeaders }`
- `createJsonResponseHandler(schema)` — parse successful response
- `createJsonErrorResponseHandler({ errorSchema, errorToMessage })` — parse error response
- `combineHeaders(a, b)` — merge header objects
- `loadApiKey({ apiKey, environmentVariableName, description })` — API key from env
- `withoutTrailingSlash(url)` — normalize base URL
- `withUserAgentSuffix(headers, suffix)` — add SDK user-agent
- `parseProviderOptions({ provider, providerOptions, schema })` — extract + validate provider-specific options
- `lazySchema(() => zodSchema(...))` — deferred Zod schema construction
- `InferSchema<typeof schema>` — derive TypeScript type from lazy schema

From `@ai-sdk/provider`:
- `ImageModelV3` — interface to implement
- `ProviderV3` — interface to implement on provider object
- `NoSuchModelError` — throw for unsupported model types
- `SharedV3Warning` — warning type for `{ type: 'unsupported', feature, details? }`

---

## Verification

```bash
# From packages/pixelart after pnpm install
pnpm type-check          # No TS errors
pnpm build               # Produces dist/index.{js,mjs,d.ts}
pnpm test:node           # All tests pass in Node environment
pnpm test:edge           # All tests pass in Edge (Workers) environment

# From repo root
pnpm --filter @ai-sdk/pixelart build
pnpm type-check:full     # No errors across entire monorepo
```

Expected outputs after build:
- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.js` (CJS)
- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.mjs` (ESM)
- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.d.ts` (types)

# Plan: Add `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

## Context

The Vercel AI SDK supports pluggable AI providers via a standard `ProviderV3` / `ImageModelV3` interface. A new fictional "PixelArt" provider needs to be added as a standalone package (`packages/pixelart`) that **only** supports image generation — no text, no embeddings. It exposes a `createPixelArt` factory and a default `pixelart` singleton, calls `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`, and supports custom image settings (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`, `seed`, `n`).

**Closest reference implementations:**
- `packages/black-forest-labs/` — flat `src/` layout, image-only provider, uses `parseProviderOptions`, same config pattern
- `packages/openai/src/image/` — per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map, usage token extraction, `_internal.currentDate`

---

## Files to Create

### Source (`packages/pixelart/src/`)

#### `version.ts`
Standard version injection:
```ts
declare const __PACKAGE_VERSION__: string | undefined;
export const VERSION: string =
  typeof __PACKAGE_VERSION__ !== 'undefined' ? __PACKAGE_VERSION__ : '0.0.0-test';
```

#### `pixelart-image-settings.ts`
Model IDs and per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map:
```ts
export type PixelArtImageModelId =
  | 'pixelart-v1'
  | 'pixelart-v2'
  | 'pixelart-v1-turbo'
  | (string & {});

export const pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall: Record<string, number> = {
  'pixelart-v1': 4,
  'pixelart-v2': 4,
  'pixelart-v1-turbo': 1,
};
```

#### `pixelart-image-api.ts`
Zod schemas for response and errors (inline in model file, no separate file needed — BFL puts them inline too; however keeping a separate file matches the OpenAI pattern and keeps schemas independently testable):
```ts
// Response: { data: [{ b64_json: string }], usage: { input_tokens?, output_tokens? } }
export const pixelartImageResponseSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    data: z.array(z.object({ b64_json: z.string() })),
    usage: z.object({ input_tokens: z.number().nullish(), output_tokens: z.number().nullish() }).nullish(),
  }))
);

// Error: { error: { message: string, code?: string } }
export const pixelartFailedResponseHandler = createJsonErrorResponseHandler({
  errorSchema: z.object({ error: z.object({ message: z.string(), code: z.string().optional() }).optional() }),
  errorToMessage: error => error.error?.message ?? 'Unknown PixelArt error',
});
```

#### `pixelart-image-model.ts`
Implements `ImageModelV3`. Key design points:
- **Synchronous** — single `postJsonToApi` call, no polling
- `maxImagesPerCall` getter reads from `pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall`, defaults to `1` for unknowns
- Provider options read from `providerOptions.pixelart` via `parseProviderOptions` with a `lazySchema`
- Warns (does not throw) for unsupported `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask`
- Maps `style` → `style`, `pixelDensity` → `pixel_density` in request body
- Returns `images` as `Array<string>` (base64)
- Maps `usage.input_tokens` → `usage.inputTokens`, `output_tokens` → `outputTokens`
- Config has `_internal?: { currentDate?: () => Date }` for test timestamp injection

Provider options schema (exported for end-user typing):
```ts
export const pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    style: z.enum(['pixel', 'retro', '8bit']).optional(),
    pixelDensity: z.number().optional(),
  }))
);
export type PixelArtImageModelOptions = InferSchema<typeof pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema>;
```

#### `pixelart-provider.ts`
Factory + singleton. Uses `withoutTrailingSlash`, `loadApiKey` (`PIXELART_API_KEY`), `withUserAgentSuffix`:
```ts
export interface PixelArtProviderSettings { apiKey?, baseURL?, headers?, fetch? }
export interface PixelArtProvider extends ProviderV3 {
  image(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  imageModel(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  textEmbeddingModel(modelId: string): never;  // deprecated alias, matches BFL pattern
}
export function createPixelArt(options = {}): PixelArtProvider { ... }
export const pixelart = createPixelArt();
```
`languageModel` and `embeddingModel` throw `NoSuchModelError`. Default `baseURL` = `'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'`. Auth header: `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.


# Plan: Add `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider Package

## Context

The Vercel AI SDK supports pluggable AI providers via a standard `ProviderV3` / `ImageModelV3` interface. A new fictional "PixelArt" provider needs to be added as a standalone package (`packages/pixelart`) that **only** supports image generation — no text, no embeddings. It exposes a `createPixelArt` factory and a default `pixelart` singleton, calls `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`, and supports custom image settings (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`, `seed`, `n`).

**Closest reference implementations:**
- `packages/black-forest-labs/` — flat `src/` layout, image-only provider, uses `parseProviderOptions`, same config pattern
- `packages/openai/src/image/` — per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map, usage token extraction, `_internal.currentDate`

---

## Files to Create

### Source (`packages/pixelart/src/`)

#### `version.ts`
Standard version injection:
```ts
declare const __PACKAGE_VERSION__: string | undefined;
export const VERSION: string =
  typeof __PACKAGE_VERSION__ !== 'undefined' ? __PACKAGE_VERSION__ : '0.0.0-test';
```

#### `pixelart-image-settings.ts`
Model IDs and per-model `maxImagesPerCall` map:
```ts
export type PixelArtImageModelId =
  | 'pixelart-v1'
  | 'pixelart-v2'
  | 'pixelart-v1-turbo'
  | (string & {});

export const pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall: Record<string, number> = {
  'pixelart-v1': 4,
  'pixelart-v2': 4,
  'pixelart-v1-turbo': 1,
};
```

#### `pixelart-image-api.ts`
Zod schemas for response and errors (inline in model file, no separate file needed — BFL puts them inline too; however keeping a separate file matches the OpenAI pattern and keeps schemas independently testable):
```ts
// Response: { data: [{ b64_json: string }], usage: { input_tokens?, output_tokens? } }
export const pixelartImageResponseSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    data: z.array(z.object({ b64_json: z.string() })),
    usage: z.object({ input_tokens: z.number().nullish(), output_tokens: z.number().nullish() }).nullish(),
  }))
);

// Error: { error: { message: string, code?: string } }
export const pixelartFailedResponseHandler = createJsonErrorResponseHandler({
  errorSchema: z.object({ error: z.object({ message: z.string(), code: z.string().optional() }).optional() }),
  errorToMessage: error => error.error?.message ?? 'Unknown PixelArt error',
});
```

#### `pixelart-image-model.ts`
Implements `ImageModelV3`. Key design points:
- **Synchronous** — single `postJsonToApi` call, no polling
- `maxImagesPerCall` getter reads from `pixelartModelMaxImagesPerCall`, defaults to `1` for unknowns
- Provider options read from `providerOptions.pixelart` via `parseProviderOptions` with a `lazySchema`
- Warns (does not throw) for unsupported `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask`
- Maps `style` → `style`, `pixelDensity` → `pixel_density` in request body
- Returns `images` as `Array<string>` (base64)
- Maps `usage.input_tokens` → `usage.inputTokens`, `output_tokens` → `outputTokens`
- Config has `_internal?: { currentDate?: () => Date }` for test timestamp injection

Provider options schema (exported for end-user typing):
```ts
export const pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema = lazySchema(() =>
  zodSchema(z.object({
    style: z.enum(['pixel', 'retro', '8bit']).optional(),
    pixelDensity: z.number().optional(),
  }))
);
export type PixelArtImageModelOptions = InferSchema<typeof pixelartImageModelOptionsSchema>;
```

#### `pixelart-provider.ts`
Factory + singleton. Uses `withoutTrailingSlash`, `loadApiKey` (`PIXELART_API_KEY`), `withUserAgentSuffix`:
```ts
export interface PixelArtProviderSettings { apiKey?, baseURL?, headers?, fetch? }
export interface PixelArtProvider extends ProviderV3 {
  image(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  imageModel(modelId: PixelArtImageModelId): ImageModelV3;
  textEmbeddingModel(modelId: string): never;  // deprecated alias, matches BFL pattern
}
export function createPixelArt(options = {}): PixelArtProvider { ... }
export const pixelart = createPixelArt();
```
`languageModel` and `embeddingModel` throw `NoSuchModelError`. Default `baseURL` = `'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'`. Auth header: `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

#### `index.ts`
```ts
export { createPixelArt, pixelart } from './pixelart-provider';
export type { PixelArtProvider, PixelArtProviderSettings } from './pixelart-provider';
export type { PixelArtImageModelId } from './pixelart-image-settings';
export type { PixelArtImageModelOptions } from './pixelart-image-model';
export { VERSION } from './version';
```

### Test fixtures

#### `src/__fixtures__/pixelart-image.json`
Minimal valid API response:
```json
{
  "data": [{ "b64_json": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVR42mNk+M9QDwADhgGAWjR9awAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==" }],
  "usage": { "input_tokens": 10, "output_tokens": 256 }
}
```

### Tests

#### `src/pixelart-image-model.test.ts`
Uses `createTestServer` from `@ai-sdk/test-server/with-vitest`. Covers:
- Correct POST URL (`/images/generate`), method, and body fields
- `size`, `seed`, `n` forwarded correctly
- `style` → `style`, `pixelDensity` → `pixel_density` in body
- Absent fields omitted (no spurious `undefined` keys)
- Header merging (provider + request headers combined)
- Warning emitted for `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask`
- Images extracted from `data[].b64_json`
- Usage mapped to `inputTokens` / `outputTokens`
- `_internal.currentDate` controls `response.timestamp`
- `maxImagesPerCall`: 4/4/1 for v1/v2/v1-turbo; 1 for unknown

#### `src/pixelart-provider.test.ts`
Covers:
- `.image()` and `.imageModel()` create `PixelArtImageModel` with correct `provider` and `baseURL`
- Custom `baseURL` is respected; trailing slash stripped
- `languageModel()` throws `NoSuchModelError`
- `embeddingModel()` throws `NoSuchModelError`

### Config files

#### `package.json`
```json
{
  "name": "@ai-sdk/pixelart",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "license": "Apache-2.0",
  "sideEffects": false,
  "main": "./dist/index.js",
  "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "files": ["dist/**/*", "src", "!src/**/*.test.ts", "!src/**/*.test-d.ts", "!src/**/__snapshots__", "!src/**/__fixtures__", "CHANGELOG.md"],
  "scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm clean && tsup --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json",
    "build:watch": "pnpm clean && tsup --watch",
    "clean": "del-cli dist *.tsbuildinfo",
    "type-check": "tsc --build",
    "test": "pnpm test:node && pnpm test:edge",
    "test:update": "pnpm test:node -u",
    "test:watch": "vitest --config vitest.node.config.js",
    "test:edge": "vitest --config vitest.edge.config.js --run",
    "test:node": "vitest --config vitest.node.config.js --run"
  },
  "exports": { "./package.json": "./package.json", ".": { "types": "...", "import": "...", "require": "..." } },
  "dependencies": { "@ai-sdk/provider": "workspace:*", "@ai-sdk/provider-utils": "workspace:*" },
  "devDependencies": { "@ai-sdk/test-server": "workspace:*", "@types/node": "20.17.24", "@vercel/ai-tsconfig": "workspace:*", "del-cli": "5.1.0", "tsup": "^8", "typescript": "5.8.3", "zod": "3.25.76" },
  "peerDependencies": { "zod": "^3.25.76 || ^4.1.8" },
  "engines": { "node": ">=18" },
  "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }
}
```
Notes: `version: "0.0.0"` (new packages start here). No `prepack`/`postpack` (no docs MDX file). No `docs/**/*` in `files`. `del-cli` explicit in devDeps (like `black-forest-labs`).

#### `tsconfig.json`
```json
{
  "extends": "./node_modules/@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json",
  "compilerOptions": { "composite": true, "rootDir": "src", "outDir": "dist" },
  "exclude": ["dist", "build", "node_modules", "tsup.config.ts"],
  "references": [
    { "path": "../provider" },
    { "path": "../provider-utils" },
    { "path": "../test-server" }
  ]
}
```
`test-server` included so test file imports resolve during `tsc --build` (matches `black-forest-labs` pattern).

#### `tsconfig.build.json`
```json
{ "extends": "./tsconfig.json", "compilerOptions": { "composite": false } }
```

#### `tsup.config.ts`
Single-entry, CJS+ESM, dts, sourcemap, with `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injected from `package.json`.

#### `vitest.node.config.js`
```js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import packageJson from './package.json';
export default defineConfig({
  test: { environment: 'node', include: ['**/*.test.ts', '**/*.test.tsx'] },
  define: { __PACKAGE_VERSION__: JSON.stringify(packageJson.version) },
});
```

#### `vitest.edge.config.js`
Same but `environment: 'edge-runtime'`.

#### `turbo.json`
```json
{ "extends": ["//"], "tasks": { "build": { "outputs": ["**/dist/**"] } } }
```

---

## File to Modify

### `/tsconfig.json` (root)
Add `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` in alphabetical order between `perplexity` and `provider`:
```diff
     { "path": "packages/perplexity" },
+    { "path": "packages/pixelart" },
     { "path": "packages/provider" },
```

| **M** | `/tsconfig.json` ← add one reference entry |

---

## Key Utilities to Reuse

From `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`:
- `postJsonToApi` — HTTP POST with JSON, returns `{ value, responseHeaders }`
- `createJsonResponseHandler(schema)` — parse successful response
- `createJsonErrorResponseHandler({ errorSchema, errorToMessage })` — parse error response
- `combineHeaders(a, b)` — merge header objects
- `loadApiKey({ apiKey, environmentVariableName, description })` — API key from env
- `withoutTrailingSlash(url)` — normalize base URL
- `withUserAgentSuffix(headers, suffix)` — add SDK user-agent
- `parseProviderOptions({ provider, providerOptions, schema })` — extract + validate provider-specific options
- `lazySchema(() => zodSchema(...))` — deferred Zod schema construction
- `InferSchema<typeof schema>` — derive TypeScript type from lazy schema

From `@ai-sdk/provider`:
- `ImageModelV3` — interface to implement
- `ProviderV3` — interface to implement on provider object
- `NoSuchModelError` — throw for unsupported model types
- `SharedV3Warning` — warning type for `{ type: 'unsupported', feature, details? }`

---

```bash

pnpm build               # Produces dist/index.{js,mjs,d.ts}

pnpm test:edge           # All tests pass in Edge (Workers) environment

# From repo root
pnpm --filter @ai-sdk/pixelart build
pnpm type-check:full     # No errors across entire monorepo
```

- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.js` (CJS)
- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.mjs` (ESM)
- `packages/pixelart/dist/index.d.ts` (types)

Perfect! I now have all the files. Let me provide you with a comprehensive summary of the complete structure:

## Complete Structure of `packages/black-forest-labs` Provider

This is an image-only provider package for the Vercel AI SDK that integrates with Black Forest Labs' image generation API (primarily Flux models).

### Configuration Files

**package.json** (version 1.0.27)
- Main entry: `./dist/index.js`
- Module: `./dist/index.mjs`
- Types: `./dist/index.d.ts`
- Key dependencies: `@ai-sdk/provider`, `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`
- Peer dependencies: `zod`
- Scripts: build, test, type-check with separate node/edge environment tests

**tsconfig.json**
- Extends: `@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json`
- Composite: true
- Root directory: `src`
- Output directory: `dist`
- References: `../provider`, `../provider-utils`, `../test-server`

**tsconfig.build.json**
- Extends `tsconfig.json`
- Disables composite for tsup builds

**tsup.config.ts**
- Builds from `src/index.ts` to CJS and ESM with source maps
- Includes declaration file generation
- Injects package version at build time

**turbo.json**
- Extends root turbo config
- Outputs: `**/dist/**`

**vitest.node.config.js** and **vitest.edge.config.js**
- Node environment tests include `**/*.test.ts`
- Edge environment uses `edge-runtime`

### Source Code Structure

**src/index.ts** - Public API
Exports:
- `createBlackForestLabs()`, `blackForestLabs` (provider factory)
- Types: `BlackForestLabsProvider`, `BlackForestLabsProviderSettings`
- Types: `BlackForestLabsImageModelId`, `BlackForestLabsAspectRatio`
- Type: `BlackForestLabsImageModelOptions`
- `VERSION` constant

**src/version.ts**
- Declares `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injected at build time
- Falls back to '0.0.0-test' in development

**src/black-forest-labs-provider.ts** - Main provider implementation
- Interface: `BlackForestLabsProviderSettings`
  - `apiKey` (reads from `BFL_API_KEY` env var)
  - `baseURL` (defaults to `https://api.bfl.ai/v1`)
  - `headers`, `fetch`, `pollIntervalMillis`, `pollTimeoutMillis`
- Interface: `BlackForestLabsProvider extends ProviderV3`
  - `image(modelId)` and `imageModel(modelId)` methods
  - Throws `NoSuchModelError` for unsupported model types (languageModel, embeddingModel)
- Factory function: `createBlackForestLabs(options)` returns configured provider
- Singleton: `blackForestLabs` (default instance)

**src/black-forest-labs-image-settings.ts** - Type definitions
- `BlackForestLabsImageModelId`: union of specific model IDs:
  - `flux-kontext-pro`
  - `flux-kontext-max`
  - `flux-pro-1.1-ultra`
  - `flux-pro-1.1`
  - `flux-pro-1.0-fill`
  - Plus open string extension for custom models
- `BlackForestLabsAspectRatio`: template literal type `${number}:${number}`

**src/black-forest-labs-image-model.ts** - Image model implementation
- Class: `BlackForestLabsImageModel implements ImageModelV3`
  - `specificationVersion`: 'v3'
  - `maxImagesPerCall`: 1
- Key methods:
  - `doGenerate()`: Main generation flow
    1. Submits request to API endpoint
    2. Polls status URL with configurable intervals (default 500ms, timeout 60s)
    3. Fetches generated image once Ready
  - `pollForImageUrl()`: Handles polling logic with timeouts
  - `getArgs()`: Prepares request body from parameters
- Supports:
  - Aspect ratios and dimensions (width/height via provider options)
  - Multiple input images (up to 10)
  - Image masks
  - Seed values
  - Provider-specific options (steps, guidance, safety tolerance, webhooks, etc.)
- Request body parameters: prompt, seed, aspect_ratio, width, height, steps, guidance, etc.
- Error handling: Custom error response parsing with message and detail fields
- Response metadata includes: seed, timings (start/end/duration), cost, megapixels

**src/black-forest-labs-image-model.ts** (continued) - Provider options schema
- `blackForestLabsImageModelOptionsSchema`: Zod schema for type-safe options
  - Image control: `imagePrompt`, `imagePromptStrength`
  - Dimensions: `width` (256-1920), `height` (256-1920)
  - Generation: `steps`, `guidance`, `outputFormat` (jpeg|png), `promptUpsampling`, `raw`
  - Safety: `safetyTolerance` (0-6)
  - Webhooks: `webhookUrl`, `webhookSecret`
  - Polling: `pollIntervalMillis`, `pollTimeoutMillis`
  - Deprecated: `inputImage`, `inputImage2`-`inputImage10`

Helper functions:
- `convertSizeToAspectRatio()`: Converts WIDTHxHEIGHT to aspect ratio
- `gcd()`: Calculates greatest common divisor for aspect ratio simplification
- Error handlers and Zod schemas for API responses

### Test Files

**src/black-forest-labs-provider.test.ts** - Provider tests
- Tests provider instantiation (`.image()` and `.imageModel()` methods)
- Tests configuration: baseURL, headers, API key loading
- Tests polling timeout behavior with configurable intervals
- Tests error handling for unsupported model types

**src/black-forest-labs-image-model.test.ts** - Model tests (577 lines)
Comprehensive test coverage:
- Parameter passing: aspect ratio, provider options
- Metadata handling: seed, cost, megapixels, timestamps
- URL sequence verification (submit → poll → fetch)
- Header merging (provider + request headers)
- Size-to-aspect-ratio conversion with warnings
- Error responses with message/detail parsing
- Poll response handling (status vs state field)
- Multiple polling attempts until Ready
- Timeout behavior verification
- Error/Failed status handling
- Response metadata structure validation

### Root Configuration

**Root tsconfig.json**
- References all packages including `packages/black-forest-labs`
- Composite TypeScript project setup for monorepo

### Key Architectural Patterns

1. **Provider Pattern**: Factory function (`createBlackForestLabs()`) returns configured provider instance
2. **Image-Only**: Intentionally throws errors for language models and embedding models
3. **Async Polling**: Built-in polling for long-running image generation jobs
4. **Provider Options**: Extensible options passed through Zod schema validation
5. **Metadata Rich**: Returns detailed provider metadata (timings, costs, pixels)
6. **Error Handling**: Custom error parsing with fallback to status codes
7. **Aspect Ratio Smart Conversion**: Automatically derives aspect ratios from dimensions
8. **Multiple Input Support**: Handles up to 10 input images or single mask

## `@ai-sdk/pixelart` — complete implementation

### 15 new files in `packages/pixelart/`

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package config — `@ai-sdk/pixelart` v0.0.1, same deps as BFL |
| `tsconfig.json` | TypeScript project references to `provider`, `provider-utils`, `test-server` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Disables `composite` for tsup builds |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Builds CJS + ESM with version injection |
| `turbo.json` | Turborepo task config |
| `vitest.node.config.js` | Node test runner |
| `vitest.edge.config.js` | Edge-runtime test runner |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injection |
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` union type + `PIXELART_MAX_IMAGES_PER_CALL` map (`v1`→4, `v2`→4, `v1-turbo`→1) |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel` class — synchronous `POST /generate`, Zod schema for `style`/`pixelDensity` provider options, warns on `aspectRatio`/`files`/`mask` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory + `pixelArt` singleton — `Authorization: Bearer` auth from `PIXELART_API_KEY`, throws `NoSuchModelError` for language/embedding models |
| `src/index.ts` | Public barrel exports |
| `src/__fixtures__/pixelart-image.json` | Sample API response fixture |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.test.ts` | 13 unit tests covering params, warnings, headers, errors, per-model maxImagesPerCall |
| `src/pixelart-provider.test.ts` | 6 unit tests covering factory, auth header, user-agent, provider options, NoSuchModelError |

### 1 line added to root `tsconfig.json`
`{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` inserted between `perplexity` and `provider`.

### Key design choices
- **Synchronous** — single `POST https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/generate`, returns base64 images directly (no polling)
- **Image-only** — `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` throw `NoSuchModelError`
- **`Authorization: Bearer`** header from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var
- **Provider options** under `providerOptions.pixelart`: `style: 'pixel'|'retro'|'8bit'` → `style`, `pixelDensity: number` → `pixel_density`
- **Warn, don't throw** for `aspectRatio`, `files`, `mask` (unsupported features)
- **Per-model `maxImagesPerCall`** via getter reading from the settings map
